extracted.title: Muttonville Lateral Capacity
extracted.description:
This notice serves to reestablish GEMS Notice ID 12550 in TC eConnects. It is reposted below without changes.

Effective gas day September 2, 2025 for ID1 cycle, the available capacity at Muttonville Lateral (Loc ID 364926) will be 80,000 Dth for shipper nominations until further notice.

If you have any questions or need assistance, please contact the ANR Nominations & Scheduling team at 1-800-827-5267.
